svg.title: Blues rig signal chain v7 — Tomsline ALR-3 ABY with Marshall DSL20 and IR-200 rig
svg.desc: Guitar splits at Tomsline ALR-3 Liner ABY switch: Path A to Marshall DSL20, Path B to tuner then RC-1 looper and full IR-200 rig.

g.text: True bypass ABY — splits to two paths
Captures pure dry signal before any effects
BOSS IR-200 — Amp & IR Cabinet Sim
Position: before cabinet · Blues Driver → Echo inside
Mode: Plate · Stereo in / Stereo out
L + R guitar · Bluetooth aux in
